sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I see:
- Player: rows 32-35, cols 52-54
- White strip: col 55, rows 32-35 (vertical strip to the RIGHT of the player now)
- Left gray box: rows 28-31, cols 16-19
- Right gray box: rows 24-31, cols 44-47 (8 rows tall)
The white strip is now to the RIGHT of the player (at col 55). Earlier it was to the LEFT (at col 0). So the white strip follows the player, always on the side opposite to the direction of movement? Or it's on the trailing edge?
Actually, when the player moved LEFT, the strip was on the left (trailing edge). When the player moved RIGHT, the strip is on the right (trailing edge). So the white strip is always on the trailing edge of the player's movement.
Now the player is at cols 52-54, which is to the RIGHT of the left gray box (cols 16-19). I need to move LEFT to position the player below the left gray box.
Wait, but the player is at rows 32-35 and the left gray box is at rows 28-31. So the player is already below the left gray box vertically. I just need to align horizontally.
The left gray box is at cols 16-19. The player is at cols 52-54. I need to move LEFT to get to cols 16-19.
But wait, the white strip is at col 55 (to the right of the player). When I move LEFT, the strip will follow on the right side (trailing edge). So the strip will be behind the player as they move left.
Actually, I need to think about this more carefully. The white strip seems to be attached to the player. When I drop it (SPACE), it becomes a horizontal strip below the player. Then when the player moves, the strip stays in place and the gray box above it grows.
But currently, the white strip is at col 55, rows 32-35. This is a vertical strip. When I drop it (SPACE), what happens?
Let me try: move LEFT to position below the left gray box, then drop the strip.
Actually, wait. The player is at cols 52-54. The left gray box is at cols 16-19. I need to move LEFT about 33 columns. But the center bar is at cols 28-39, which might block the player.
Let me check if the player can move through the center bar. Actually, the player is at rows 32-35 and the center bar is at rows 28-31. So they don't overlap vertically. The player should be able to move LEFT past the center bar.
Let me move LEFT to position below the left gray box.

Plan: Move LEFT to position below left gray box (cols 16-19), then drop strip to grow it.
